description: Despondent, Raina attempts suicide by moving into traffic but is interrupted by a team seeking to detain her. Suddenly, Gordon teleports in, reassures her, and rescues Raina in a display of his powers, promising to show her the way. This scene brings together the Inhuman plot threads and hints at new directions for transformed characters.

transcript.line: Don't move. We're not here to hurt you. We just want to take you in.
No. Either you kill me... or I make you do it.
It's okay, beautiful. I'll show you the way.
